pages.text: A tiny little golem that not only run around in excitement, but also rip through foes with their stone maw.
One can call these creatures through the use of a $(l:focuses/geomancy/ministrous_focus)Ministrous Focus$(). They can be healed by right-clicking on them with Stone.
Summoned while wearing a $(l:crafts/garment/geo_robe)Geo Robes$() or through ritual, these ministrosities are stronger than their stone counterparts and are immune to fire.
